non_negotiables: Vision → Product Truth → Journey Certification → Implementation → Deployment
Invite-chain CERTIFIED PRESENT is named launch blocker
Persistence remains netlify_blobs + static_seed until dual-write proven
Do not invent Field Plan doctrine
No personnel assign until Postgres + RBAC
Commit and push after every ship interaction

work_packages.title: Invite-chain six-axis evidence on production

work_packages.acceptance: No live 25% campus claims; shells labeled; demo leaders tagged DEMO; activeBuildLane matches tip
